creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm testing the port, I made a few minor corrections I will describe to you once I'm done.

In the while, once the port is added to the ports tree you can be added to the FreeBSD additional contributors list [1].

Usually people are listed by full name and email address.

Can you give me your full name, or a nickname if you don't want to disclose your full name, so I can add you to the list? That obviously if you approve getting listed.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributors/contrib-additional.html
